title: Dozed
description: Additions of new utilities for traversal such as “Dash”, “Wall Jump”, etc. Also new access to Quality of Life.
body:
[Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/xHRwb8mPKB)

The main feature of this mod is the "Star Core", an item that allows the player to utilize movement abilities.

**Dozed is configurable through the Client (dozed-client.toml) and Server (dozed-server.toml) since 1.0.3.**

**To get started:**

Hold a Nether Star in either hand while it is night time. Look around for fallen materials.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![A Player is holding the Nether Star in one hand at night, while a piece of crystal has landed next to them.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a36e8cedf73a123fda78aa9af9c77167e4fbac6c.png)

![A Player has the Star Core inside the new Inventory Slot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d17880e53855fe5bdcc6385da20bf5d2f855ed2a.png)

</details>



**Further explanation:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Craft the Altar Table using the Crystal Alloy which is picked up in the ground. It has the same crafting recipe as a Crafting Table.
- To use the Altar Table, right-click with an ingredient, then right-click with an empty hand to get the output. If no output is created, then the ingredients will be dropped instead.

</details>



**Altar Table Recipes:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- 4x Crystal Alloy -> Star Core
- 1x Crystal Alloy + X Book + 1x Enchanted Item -> Disenchanted Item and X Enchanted Book
- 1x Ender Pearl + 1x Crystal Alloy -> Ender Light

</details>


**How To:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Get the Void Core - Throw the Star Core into the void.
- Get the Quasar Core - Throw the Void Core into the light, and wait for it to change.

</details>



 

Item and Icon Textures designed by @BackupCup
